productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Duramo Luxury 3 Sports Shoes
description: When only the best will do, choose adidas for your sports shoes – every detail has been designed to enhance your performance.  From the outsole to the lacing, nothing has been left to chance and everything has been built for lightweight speed and support.  UpperMesh and reflective upper for maximum flexibility, durability and styleadidas patented 3-Stripes in silver and pink on the midfoot for enhanced visibility Padded mesh-lined collar and tongue for snug comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitSoft footbed for comfortMidsoleAdiPrene midsole for long lasting cushioning and support – especially shock absorption at the heel OutsoleAdiWear outsole - non-marking rubber which gives abrasion-resistance and durabilityshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
